---
name: Feature request
about: Propose new behaviour or a workflow change
title: "feat: "
labels: [enhancement]
---

## What

One sentence describing the feature.

## Why

What hurts today, who else has the problem, and what changes when this lands.

## Alternative approaches considered

- Approach A — tradeoffs:
- Approach B — tradeoffs:

## Out of scope

What we explicitly do not want this feature to do.
